login.timeout: The service did not respond in time. Try again.
login.offline: There is no network connection. Check your internet access and try again.
login.networkError: The connection was interrupted. Try again after the network is restored.
login.serviceUnavailable: The sign-in service is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
login.mfaUnavailable: Sign-in verification is temporarily unavailable. Start sign in again later.
